commands.review_summary:
This PR changes plugin auto-enable and provider-enable allowlist helpers so `plugins.allow: []` remains open while configured plugins are enabled, with focused regression tests for idempotence and provider SDK behavior.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +117. Total +118 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the linked issue context: current main can append plugin ids to an empty `plugins.allow`, and plugin activation treats a now-populated allowlist as restrictive. I did not run a live gateway restart in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; maintainers should review the compatibility-sensitive allowlist semantics and required CI/proof before merge.
